description: Address v2 semantic review findings: fix countdown hydration mismatch, carousel dot tap targets, offer card cutout background tokens, and dark-mode shimmer visibility.
steps: Fix lib/hooks/use-countdown.ts: Initialize useState with zero placeholder instead of calling getTimeLeft during render to eliminate SSR/client hydration mismatch
Fix components/home/promo-banners.tsx: Restructure dot buttons to have min 44px tap target using padding/min-size on the button while keeping visual dot small as a child span
Fix components/offers/offers-client.tsx: Replace hardcoded bg-[#F7F7FA] dark:bg-[#020617] on cutout elements with bg-background
Fix app/offers/loading.tsx: Change dark:via-white/5 to dark:via-white/10 for better shimmer visibility in dark mode
acceptance_criteria: useCountdown initializes with zero placeholder - no Date.now() call during useState initialization
Carousel dot buttons have >= 44px touch area
Offer card cutouts use bg-background instead of hardcoded hex colors
Dark-mode shimmer uses via-white/10 for better visibility
verification: Run npx eslint lib/hooks/use-countdown.ts components/home/promo-banners.tsx components/offers/offers-client.tsx app/offers/loading.tsx
findings: All 4 v2 review issues addressed. Lint passes with 0 errors on all modified files. Tests: 63/64 pass (1 pre-existing Upstash env config failure, documented in FEAT-001/002/003/004). Issue 4 (stale closure on endDate change) acknowledged as safe for current usage - no code change needed.
